title: Himouto! Umaru-chan Custom GUI Pack
body:
**![](https://i.imgur.com/wrmFalR.png)**

**It's GUI ONLY Resource pack**  **so you can freely use it with other resource packs. Just place it on top of resource pack you use.**

  
**This is a GUI packed themed towards the show "Himouto! Umaru-chan". Don't hesitate to comment down below, I have even changed hot bar as well hope you enjoy. I have taken the opportunity to experiment with adding different pictures to each container**. **The palette that I choose is Blue & Orange but maybe in the future, If you guys want other colors like Red & white or any colors else.**

  
**please tell me I will think about it!**  
**If you found any bugs please report to me I will fix it as soon as I can.**
